query:
UPDATE terms
            SET term_type = $1,
                term_name = $2,
                description = $3,
                negotiation_status = $4,
                parent_term_id = $5,
                version = $6,
                proposed_at = $7,
                resolved_at = $8,
                is_mandatory = $9,
                resolution = $10
            WHERE id = $11
